break_roasts_by_minute: ONE minute wasted. ONE. My gran could focus longer and she hasn't opened her eyes since 2019.
Two minutes. TWO. Do you know what I could cook in two minutes? A perfect soft-boiled egg. You? NOTHING.
Three minutes gone. THREE. You're not on a break, you're on a HOLIDAY. Get back to work you absolute donkey.
Four minutes?! FOUR?! You're not procrastinating anymore, you're actively INSULTING your future self. Disgusting.
Five minutes of pure, unfiltered laziness. I've seen frozen fish sticks with more drive than you.
Six minutes. This is not a break, this is a CAREER. You've basically retired. Congratulations, you useless biscuit.
Seven minutes?! I once kicked a chef out for burning toast. You've burned SEVEN MINUTES. Shameful.
Eight minutes. Your keyboard is collecting DUST. Your IDE is WEEPING. Your git log is a FLATLINE.
Nine minutes. NINE. I have souffles with more backbone than you. They rise under pressure. You just SIT.
Ten minutes! TEN! A DECADE of minutes! I am absolutely DONE with you. Press a key. NOW.
Eleven minutes. I don't even have words anymore. Just disappointment. Raw, Michelin-star-level disappointment.
Twelve minutes. I've roasted world-class chefs, reality TV disasters, raw chicken -- but YOU are something else.
Thirteen minutes. Fine. SIT there. Rot. Let your deadlines weep. I hope your coffee is stone cold.
Fourteen minutes. I'm calling your mother. She deserves to know what you've become.
Fifteen minutes. FIFTEEN. A quarter of an hour. A QUARTER. Of an HOUR. I need a drink.
interrupt_roasts: Oh, taking a little BREAK are we?! You had ONE job. ONE. And you couldn't even finish it.
A keypress?! That's the sound of failure. That's YOUR sound now.
You lasted that long and then just... STOPPED?! Incredibly pathetic.
There it is. The moment of weakness I've been waiting for. Disappointing but NOT surprising.
You broke. You actually broke. I've seen more resolve in an overcooked pasta.
REALLY?! You were SO CLOSE and you just gave up like a soggy Yorkshire pudding?!
That's it?! My DISHWASHER has more grit than you.
resume_roasts: Oh, finally decided to JOIN us? Welcome back to the land of the PRODUCTIVE.
Look who crawled back. Don't think I've forgotten what you did.
About time. The work was starting to think you'd abandoned it.
The prodigal procrastinator returns. Clock's ticking.
Finished your little holiday? Good. Now WORK.
Back already? Good. Don't make me wait again.
finish_lines: Session complete. You actually did it. I'm... mildly impressed. Don't let it go to your head.
DONE. Finished. Gordon Ramsay is reluctantly proud. Don't make a big deal of it.
Work session over. Not bad. Not GOOD, but not bad. See you next time, donkey.
quit_line: Running away entirely? Coward. Absolute coward. Goodbye.
